summary: Implemented InputState, LSTextField, and LSTextArea with sandbox stories plus unit and instrumentation coverage, then validated the branch on host with unit tests, androidTest compile, connected instrumentation, compile, release assembly, story/boundary greps, and the sandbox-symbol gate.
verification_commands: adb -s emulator-5554 wait-for-device shell 'while [[ "$(getprop sys.boot_completed)" != "1" ]]; do sleep 1; done; echo booted'

for s in default focused error disabled; do grep -q "atoms.textfield.$s" android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/LSInputStories.kt || exit 1; grep -q "atoms.textarea.$s" android/app/src/debug/java/com/laneshadow/sandbox/stories/LSInputStories.kt || exit 1; done && ! grep -REn 'Color\(0x|androidx\.compose\.material\.icons|Icons\.(Filled|Outlined)|FontFamily\.(Serif|SansSerif|Monospace|Default)' android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/atoms/LSTextField.kt android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/atoms/LSTextArea.kt
source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew tasks --all | rg -i detekt

evidence: LSTextFieldTest passed on host and verifies default border, radius, and padding token resolution.
The host unit-test command completed successfully.
LSTextAreaTest passed on host and verifies multiline rendering with starting row count.
The host unit-test command completed successfully.
LSTextFieldTest passed on host and verifies all four InputState border token mappings.
The host compile and unit-test commands both completed successfully.
LSTextFieldInstrumentationTest passed on the booted Pixel_7_API_34 emulator.
The connectedDebugAndroidTest run completed with 2 tests finished and BUILD SUCCESSFUL.
LSTextFieldTest passed on host and verifies the error state resolves the danger border token.
Instrumentation also exercises focused-state semantics separately.
LSTextAreaTest verifies helper behavior for auto-grow and scroll-at-maxRows.
LSTextAreaInstrumentationTest passed on emulator and asserts visibleRows=6 plus scrollEnabled=true semantics.
The story grep gate passed for all default/focused/error/disabled textfield and textarea ids.
AtomsStories.kt aggregates LSInputStories in the current debug sandbox wiring.
The forbidden literal grep gate passed across LSTextField.kt and LSTextArea.kt.
No literal color/font/icon references were detected in the task files.
The release APK sandbox-symbol check returned 0 com.nativesandbox entries.

reviewer_considerations: The live repo uses AtomsStories.kt and theme code under tokens/platforms/kotlin rather than the task doc paths, so the implementation follows the live tree.
The repo exposes no detekt Gradle task; the documented detekt check is a task-doc mismatch rather than a task regression.
The release artifact path is android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk in this repo, and the sandbox-symbol gate was validated against that file.
notes: Host instrumentation used a freshly booted Pixel_7_API_34 emulator on emulator-5554 and the focused run completed successfully with 2 tests.
